default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX teams to discuss performance metrics, content strategy, and team changes.](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Record-breaking performance: 154 clicks in a single day, upward trends across metrics](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - SEO success: Exec now ranking \#1 for key queries like "best AI roleplay platform overall"
  - [Content strategy: Focus on virtual/AI roleplay equivalence, sales roleplay scenarios, and how-to content](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Team change: Elvis leaving GrowthX, new team member Joe joining in September](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

## Topics

### Performance Metrics

  - [New record: 154 clicks in a single day](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Upward trends across all metrics](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Popular content: roleplay scenarios, stats page, insurance roleplay scripts, medical roleplay](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [LLM referrals expected to surpass last month, with ChatGPT as the majority source](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Improved Google and AI overview rankings](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

### SEO Strategy and Success

  - Exec now ranking \#1 for queries like "best AI roleplay platform overall"
  - [Key change: Listing Exec first in listicles and using "best AI roleplay platform" phrasing](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - Low bounce rates (\<50%) indicating relevant content
  - [Focus on bridging gap between "virtual" and "AI roleplay" searches](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [Opportunity to target "sales roleplay" keywords](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Three main buckets for highly cited content: competitor comparisons, comprehensive guides, how-to content](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Plan to create 10 new how-to articles based on keyword research and competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Garrett to provide 10 refined article titles by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)

### Technical Issues

  - [Double articles appearing on site due to Contentful configuration](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Sean to address the syncing issue](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

### Team Changes

  - [Elvis leaving GrowthX, last week with the team](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [New team member Joe joining first week of September](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Megan to continue working on the account, ensuring continuity](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Garrett to provide 10 refined how-to article titles by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [Sean to fix the double article issue in Contentful](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Team to continue implementing current content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Smooth transition to new team member Joe in September](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Maintain communication via Slack between weekly meetings](https://fathom.video/share/2ktx8uR81izEsBWz_9m18azoPMsYBrEG?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)

action_items.description: Review and complete configuration tasks for GrowthX content strategy
Fix Contentful issue causing double article display on website
Review how-to content titles in Airtable, select/propose 10 best for new articles by end of week
